company_context: Appcues: Customer Engagement Platform for Web & Mobile Introducing Appcues AI: a system of agents that help build better experiences Learn more Interactive tour Login Book a demo Login Book a demo CUSTOMER ENGAGEMENT PLATFORM Personalized for every user. Easy for every team. Appcues helps teams deliver personalized in-app, email, and push experiences based on how users behave. Fuel long-term growth through customers who engage, stick around, and grow with you. Book a demo Take a tour what you can do Make the most out of your product investment build awareness Turn attention into excitement Your product is full of customers who care. Use it to keep them informed, excited, and in the loop. Drive adoption Guide users to their first win Help customers find their footing, surface the next step, and make every milestone feel like progress. Grow engagement Keep customers coming back Keep users curious, heard, and moving forward with messages that make every interaction count. Experiences that get smarter with every interaction Users expect experiences that keep up with their behavior. Appcues is building an AI-powered engine that figures out what they need, reaches them across every channel, and improves continuously — so your team stays focused on strategy, not execution. Start with the outcome you want Name the goals that matter to your business. APPCUES AI-POWERED GROWTH ENGINE understand Continuously listening to your users Behavior signals and context from your connected tools surface who's stuck, who's thriving, and who's at risk. decide Choosing the best next action for every user Your audience, the right experience, and the perfect moment — recommended based on what users have done. act Delivering experiences that land Personalized content reaches users across in-app, email, and mobile based on exactly where they are in their journey. learn Proving what worked, improving what didn't Winners scale, under-performers get retired, and every result feeds back into the next cycle to sharpen what comes next. Always on. Always improving. Built for non-technical teams with a need for speed "Working with Appcues is the definition of working smarter not harder to meet customers where they are." Nancy Elias-Shabsigh Product Operations Manager, Newsela

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours make the most out of their data. I came across Appcues and was impressed with the work you're doing in customer engagement. Can you tell me a bit about your current data processing setup?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yeah. We're using a combination of in-house tools and some third-party services. It's been working okay, but we're always looking for ways to improve. What makes DeepData AI different from what's already out there?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, our solution uses AI-powered algorithms to process data faster and more accurately than traditional methods. This can help you gain deeper insights into your customers' behavior and make more informed decisions. We've seen companies like yours increase their customer engagement by up to 30% after implementing our solution.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That sounds interesting, but I'm not sure if we're in the market for a new data processing solution right now. We're in the middle of our budget cycle, and I'm not sure if we have the resources to allocate to a new tool. Plus, I'd need to evaluate how it would integrate with our existing systems, including Appcues.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand. Integration is a top priority for us, and we've worked with several companies that use Appcues. We can provide a seamless integration that won't disrupt your current workflow. As for budget, we offer flexible pricing plans that can fit your needs. Would you be open to a demo to see how our solution can address your specific pain points?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but like I said, budget is a concern. Even if I were interested, I'm not the one who makes the final purchasing decisions. Our CFO would need to sign off on any new expenditures, and I'm not sure if they'd be willing to allocate funds for a new data processing solution right now.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand that budget and authority can be challenges. Can I at least send you some information about our solution and follow up with you in a few weeks to see if anything has changed?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: No, I don't think that's necessary. I appreciate your time, but I'm afraid we're not going to be moving forward with DeepData AI at this time. We need to prioritize our existing initiatives and can't take on any new tools or projects right now. Thank you for reaching out, though.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's budget concerns and potentially offered a pilot or proof-of-concept to help build a business case for the solution. Sentiment: Neutral
